title: Cryptography & Authentication
overview: Module 2 builds your cryptographic foundations. You'll understand how encryption protects data, how certificates establish trust, and how authentication systems verify identity — then fix a real certificate problem on a healthcare client's patient portal.

units_breakdown.labDesc: Symmetric vs asymmetric, hashing, key exchange. Hands-on with OpenSSL.
Certificates, PKI, MFA concepts. Certificate validation and chain of trust.
Client engagement. Diagnose and fix the expired portal certificate, then document for HIPAA evidence.

clientContext.label: Client Context: Gulf Coast Healthcare Partners
clientContext.body: Patients are seeing browser security warnings when accessing the portal. Dr. Okonkwo (CMIO) is concerned about patient trust. Jennifer Walsh (CISO) needs the certificate issue diagnosed and fixed — with documentation suitable for HIPAA compliance records.

stakeholders.name: Jennifer Walsh
stakeholders.title: CISO, Gulf Coast Healthcare
stakeholders.concern: Fix it, document it, and give me evidence I can hand to HIPAA auditors. The OCR audit is on the horizon — I can’t afford another finding.

stakeholders.name: Dr. Michael Okonkwo
stakeholders.title: CMIO, Gulf Coast Healthcare
stakeholders.concern: Every browser warning a patient sees is one more reason they distrust us. We just rebuilt that trust after the ransomware incident. Don’t let us lose it again.

footer: Start with Lab 2.1 in the Assignments section.
